name: Penne Alla Vodka

ingredients.item: can San Marzano tomatoes plus 1 can water

method: In a large frying pan on medium heat, saute onion and red pepper flakes in 2 T olive oil, add vodka and let the alcohol burn off. Add tomatoes, water, garlic, salt, pepper, and simmer on low for about 20 minutes. In the meantime, prepare penne pasta al dente in salted water. When pasta is nearly ready, add heavy cream, pecorino cheese, torn basil leaves, and 2 T butter to the simmering vodka tomato sauce. Mix well, sauce will be creamy and rich. Drain penne and add directly to sauce. Mix and manticare well! Garnish with basil and grated pecorino. Serves 2-3. Serving suggestion: fresh bread and salad. Olé
